categories.title: Design process
categories.description: Cross-cutting game design concepts and index workflows.

categories.title: Mechanic catalog
categories.description: Fields on reusable mechanic entries in the mechanics library.

categories.title: Game variables
categories.description: Tracked state variables shared across games and maps.

categories.title: UI menus
categories.description: Screen patterns and menu flow in the UI menu catalog.

categories.title: Design skills
categories.description: Player skills trained by mechanics and game loops.

categories.title: Gameplay maps
categories.description: Game and genre recipe maps binding mechanics, variables, and menus.

categories.title: Bindings and relationships
categories.description: How entities link together on maps and in catalogs.

agent-context.title: Agent context
agent-context.short: Summaries and prompts for AI design assistants.
agent-context.long: Bundles summary_for_agents, gdd_prompt, and implementation_checklist for agent workflows.

co-occurrence.title: Co-occurrence
co-occurrence.long: Shows mechanic pairs or clusters on shared games; useful for genre fingerprints.

core-loop.title: Core loop
core-loop.short: The repeating cycle of actions the player performs moment to moment.
core-loop.long: The core loop is the heartbeat of a game: perceive, decide, act, receive feedback, repeat. Maps store it in narrative.core_loop and gdd_outline.core_loop.

design-pillars.title: Design pillars
design-pillars.short: Non-negotiable creative goals that guide tradeoffs.
design-pillars.long: Short intent statements that keep features aligned with the player fantasy. Appears in narrative and design_intent on maps.

enrichment.title: Enrichment
enrichment.short: Curated design pedagogy beyond bare schema fields.
enrichment.long: Adding design_guidance, agent_context, and map-specific notes so entries are actionable. Export computes enrichment_status per entity type.

field.design_guidance.when_to_avoid.title: When to avoid
field.design_guidance.when_to_avoid.long: Bullet list of cases to skip this pattern.

field.design_guidance.when_to_use.title: When to use
field.design_guidance.when_to_use.long: Primary enrichment field across mechanics, variables, menus, and skills.

field.design_guidance.where_to_use.title: Where to use
field.design_guidance.where_to_use.short: Placement in genre, loop phase, or UI.

field.map.context.title: Context
field.map.context.long: Situates the map for filters and agent briefs.

field.map.gdd_outline.title: GDD outline (field)
field.map.gdd_outline.short: Structured GDD sections on the map.
field.map.gdd_outline.long: overview, core_loop, goals, constraints, and system notes.

field.map.mechanics.domain.title: Domain (binding)
field.map.mechanics.domain.short: Pillar for this binding on the map.

field.map.mechanics.expression.title: Expression
field.map.mechanics.expression.short: Short formula or pattern for the binding.

field.map.mechanics.map_notes.title: Map notes (mechanic)
field.map.mechanics.map_notes.long: How the mechanic expresses on this title.

field.map.mechanics.phase.title: Phase
field.map.mechanics.phase.short: When in the loop the mechanic peaks.

field.map.mechanics.role.title: Mechanic role (map)
field.map.mechanics.role.long: How important the binding is on this map.

field.map.mechanics.weight.title: Weight
field.map.mechanics.weight.long: Optional priority for agents composing briefs.

field.map.menu_flow.title: Menu flow (map)
field.map.menu_flow.long: How players move between screens on this title.

field.map.narrative.title: Narrative
field.map.narrative.short: Description, core loop, skills tested, pillars.
field.map.narrative.long: Human-facing story of the game or genre recipe.

field.map.skill_slugs.title: Design skills
field.map.skill_slugs.short: Skill catalog links for this map.
field.map.skill_slugs.long: Cross-links to skills trained or emphasized.

field.map.systems.title: Systems
field.map.systems.short: Failure model, economy, pacing, loop phases.
field.map.systems.long: High-level system characterization for GDD seeds.

field.map.ui_menus.role.title: Menu role (map)
field.map.ui_menus.role.long: How essential the menu is on this map.

field.map.variable_relationships.title: Variable relationships
field.map.variable_relationships.short: Edges between variables on the map.

field.map.variables.expression.title: Expression (variable)
field.map.variables.expression.short: How the variable shows on this map.

field.map.variables.role.title: Variable role (map)
field.map.variables.role.long: Visibility and importance on this map.

field.map.variants.title: Variants
field.map.variants.short: Alternate rule sets or difficulty modes.
field.map.variants.long: Label, notes, and signature add/drop lists.

field.map.views.title: Views
field.map.views.long: Preset filters by role or flavor for exploration.

field.mechanic.agent_context.title: Agent context (mechanic)
field.mechanic.agent_context.short: AI-facing summary and prompts for this mechanic.
field.mechanic.agent_context.long: summary_for_agents is required for enrichment complete. Optional gdd_prompt and implementation_checklist.

field.mechanic.complexity.title: Complexity
field.mechanic.complexity.short: Implementation and cognitive load: S, M, or L.

field.mechanic.design_exercises.title: Design exercises
field.mechanic.design_exercises.short: Practice prompts with constraints and success criteria.
field.mechanic.design_exercises.long: Structured exercises for workshops or agent tasks.

field.mechanic.design_guidance.title: Design guidance
field.mechanic.design_guidance.short: When, where, and how to apply the mechanic.
field.mechanic.design_guidance.long: Includes when_to_use, where_to_use, when_to_avoid, and designer_notes. Required for enrichment complete status together with agent_context.

field.mechanic.domain.title: Domain
field.mechanic.domain.short: Which gameplay pillar the mechanic primarily affects.
field.mechanic.domain.long: Used on mechanic entries and map bindings to align systems.

field.mechanic.examples.title: Examples
field.mechanic.examples.long: Each example has label, description, and optional map_slug.

field.mechanic.flavor.title: Flavor
field.mechanic.flavor.short: High-level genre family: action, adventure, or strategy.
field.mechanic.flavor.long: Taxonomy axis orthogonal to domain. Helps filter and compose genre recipes.

enumHelp.strategy: Planning, resource tradeoffs, and long horizons.

field.mechanic.learning_objectives.title: Learning objectives
field.mechanic.learning_objectives.short: Designer outcomes when applying the mechanic.
field.mechanic.learning_objectives.long: Schema 1.3 pedagogy field for teaching and briefs.

field.mechanic.parameter_knobs.title: Parameter knobs
field.mechanic.parameter_knobs.short: Tunable values that change mechanic feel.
field.mechanic.parameter_knobs.long: Name, range, and effect triples for balancing.

field.mechanic.player_experience.title: Player experience
field.mechanic.player_experience.short: How the mechanic feels moment to moment.
field.mechanic.player_experience.long: Emotional and readability notes for designers.

field.mechanic.skills_developed.title: Skills developed
field.mechanic.skills_developed.short: Design skill slugs trained by this mechanic.
field.mechanic.skills_developed.long: Links mechanics catalog to skills catalog.

field.mechanic.summary.title: Summary
field.mechanic.summary.long: The primary human-readable definition. Should stand alone without reading the full entry.

field.mechanic.synergies.title: Synergies
field.mechanic.synergies.long: Cross-links for composition and co-occurrence exploration.

field.mechanic.synergy_notes.title: Synergy notes
field.mechanic.synergy_notes.short: Per-synergy explanation of why combinations work.
field.mechanic.synergy_notes.long: Pairs slug with a short note for designers.

field.mechanic.tags.title: Tags
field.mechanic.tags.short: Controlled vocabulary labels for search and requirements.
field.mechanic.tags.long: Tags must match mechanic-tags.json. Used in requirements and filters.

field.menu.input_context.title: Input context
field.menu.input_context.short: Primary input scheme the menu targets.

field.menu.layer.title: Layer
field.menu.layer.short: When the menu appears in the session.
field.menu.layer.long: meta (between runs), in_game (during play), or combat_overlay.

field.menu.menu_type.title: Menu type
field.menu.menu_type.long: Values include main, pause, inventory, shop, hub, boons, and others. Groups navigation, commerce, and overlay patterns.

field.menu.typical_actions.title: Typical actions
field.menu.typical_actions.short: Common player actions on this screen.
field.menu.typical_actions.long: Bullet list of verbs the menu supports.

field.skill.category.title: Skill category
field.skill.category.short: motor, cognitive, strategic, social, or creative.
field.skill.category.long: Taxonomy for design skills the game trains.

field.skill.design_guidance.title: Design guidance (skill)
field.skill.design_guidance.short: When to emphasize this skill in a design.
field.skill.design_guidance.long: when_to_use maps to When to emphasize on the site.

field.skill.learning_outcome.title: Learning outcome
field.skill.learning_outcome.short: What the player learns by practicing.
field.skill.learning_outcome.long: Required for skill enrichment complete with related_mechanics.

field.skill.practice_activities.title: Practice activities
field.skill.practice_activities.short: In-game activities that train the skill.
field.skill.practice_activities.long: Concrete loops or challenges tied to mechanics.

field.variable.agent_context.title: Agent context (variable)
field.variable.agent_context.long: Optional gdd_prompt and checklist for implementation.

field.variable.category.title: Variable category
field.variable.category.long: stat, resource, currency, slot, meter, counter, or flag.

field.variable.design_guidance.title: Design guidance (variable)
field.variable.design_guidance.short: When to use or avoid this variable type.

field.variable.player_focus.title: Player focus
field.variable.player_focus.short: What the player watches or optimizes.
field.variable.player_focus.long: Ties the variable to readable UI and decisions.

field.variable.scope.title: Scope
field.variable.scope.short: Who or what owns the variable.
field.variable.scope.long: player, party, world, session, or run.

field.variable.shared_rationale.title: Shared rationale
field.variable.shared_rationale.short: Why this variable exists across games.
field.variable.shared_rationale.long: Cross-game design intent. Required with player_focus for variable enrichment complete.

field.variable.typical_range.title: Typical range
field.variable.typical_range.long: Helps agents tune defaults without guessing.

field.variable.value_kind.title: Value kind
field.variable.value_kind.long: integer, float, boolean, enum, slot_list, or grid.

filter.domain.title: Domain filter
filter.domain.long: locomotion, combat, progression, economy, level, session.

filter.enrichment.title: Enrichment filter
filter.enrichment.long: Shows entries missing required pedagogy fields.

gdd.title: Game Design Document (GDD)
gdd.short: A living design spec describing goals, loops, systems, and constraints.
gdd.long: A Game Design Document captures what the game is, who it is for, and how systems interact. In this index, map gdd_outline fields seed a GDD from signature mechanics, constraints, and progression notes.

gdd-outline.title: GDD outline
gdd-outline.short: Structured GDD seed on gameplay maps.
gdd-outline.long: The gdd_outline block exports designer-facing sections: overview, core_loop, player_goals, constraints, and optional combat, economy, and progression notes.

player-fantasy.title: Player fantasy
player-fantasy.short: The identity or power fantasy the game sells.
player-fantasy.long: Answers who am I in this game. Stored in design_intent.player_fantasy and should align with signature mechanics.

quality-tier.title: Quality tier
quality-tier.short: Map curation level on gameplay maps.
quality-tier.long: Signals how game-specific and hand-enriched a map is.

section.analytics.enrichment.title: Enrichment coverage
section.analytics.enrichment.short: Percent of catalog with pedagogy complete.
section.analytics.enrichment.long: Analytics metrics for mechanics, skills, variables, and menus.

section.map.context.title: Context section
section.map.context.long: Situates the title for agents and filters.

section.map.description.title: Description section
section.map.description.long: Primary human-readable summary of the game or genre recipe.

section.map.gdd-outline.title: GDD outline section
section.map.gdd-outline.long: Exportable sections for briefs and agents.

section.map.mechanics.title: Mechanic bindings section
section.map.mechanics.long: Role, phase, domain, and notes per mechanic.

section.map.ui-menus.title: UI menu bindings section
section.map.ui-menus.long: Role and notes per menu binding.

section.map.variables.title: Variable bindings section
section.map.variables.long: Role and expression per variable binding.

section.map.variants.title: Variants section
section.map.variants.long: Optional rule variants for the same map.

section.mechanic.summary.title: Summary section
section.mechanic.summary.long: Core description of the reusable mechanic.

section.skill.learning-outcome.title: Learning outcome section
section.skill.learning-outcome.long: What players learn through related mechanics.

signature-gameplay.title: Signature gameplay
signature-gameplay.short: Mechanics that define game or genre identity.
signature-gameplay.long: Ordered mechanic slugs that are headline interactions; bindings use role signature.
